productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Casual Black Wallet
description: Crafted from genuine leather, this wallet from Reid and Taylor is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Reid and Taylor have perfected this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes by combining classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet. Dimensions: 11.5 cm x 9 cm Two main compartments with embossed branding on the front Textured upper Two slip pockets for coins on the left side with a removable flap on top with two photo id slots Three card holder slots on the right side Contrasting stitch detail on the wallet for style Care Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
